sections.paragraph:
pl. גַּלְגִּלִים (from the root גָּלַל).-

(1) a wheel, of a chariot, Isa 5:28 Eze 10:2, Eze 10:6 23:24 26:10 of a well to draw water, Ecc 12:6.

(2) a whirlwind, Psa 77:19 Eze 10:13. (Syr. ܓܰܠܓܳܠܐܳ). Hence-

(3) straw, chaff, husk, which is driven by a whirlwind; Psa 83:14, אֱלֹהַי שִׁיתֵמֹו בַגַּלְגַּל “my God make them as chaff, which the wind drives away;” Isa 17:13, כַּגַּלְגַּל לִפְנֵי סוּפָה “like chaff in the whirlwind;” Parall. מֹץ (Aram. ܓܶܠܳ, גִּלָּא chaff, dust, and the like, driven by the wind, Arab. جِالُّ id.

גלגל

Ch. a wheel, Dan 7:9.
